topicOverview: An in-depth deep dive into Electronics. Mastering this is critical for passing technical interviews for Embedded Systems Engineer roles.
whyItMatters: Electronics is a core foundation of modern engineering. Interviewers use it as a proxy to test your deeper understanding of systems, performance, and best practices.
examples: Implementing Electronics in a real-world scenario
practiceQuestions: Fix the bug in the given Electronics snippet.
interviewQuestions: What are the pros and cons of Electronics?
How does Electronics handle memory management?
